import React from "react"; const Summary = ({ user }) => { const displayName = user?.name || user?.username || "User"; return ( <>
Hi, {displayName}!

{user?.email}

Mobile: {user?.mobilenumber}

Equity

3.74k

Margin available

Margins used 0{" "}

Opening balance 3.74k{" "}

Holdings (13)

1.55k +5.20%{" "}

P&L

Current Value 31.43k{" "}

Investment 29.88k{" "}

); }; export default Summary;
